response: {"name":"eCLIP-seq library preparation","description":"Enhanced CLIP (eCLIP) library preparation protocol for mapping RNA-binding protein (RBP)–RNA interactions genome-wide, involving UV crosslinking, immunoprecipitation, adapter ligation, reverse transcription, and paired-end high-throughput sequencing.","data_type":"sequencing","raw_data_source":null,"steps":[{"step_number":1,"description":"RNA-binding protein–RNA interactions are stabilized by UV crosslinking of live cells at 254 nm.","input_data":"Live cells (e.g., K562, HepG2; typically 10×10^6 or 20×10^6 cells)","output_data":"UV-crosslinked cells with covalently stabilized RBP-RNA complexes","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"UV_wavelength":"254 nm","UV_dose":"400 mJ/cm²"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":2,"description":"Cells are lysed in iCLIP lysis buffer to release RBP-RNA complexes, followed by limited RNA fragmentation with RNase I.","input_data":"UV-crosslinked cells","output_data":"Cell lysate with fragmented RBP-RNA complexes","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"lysis_buffer":"iCLIP lysis buffer","RNase":"RNase I (Ambion)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":3,"description":"RBP-RNA complexes are immunoprecipitated using a target-specific primary antibody and magnetic beads pre-coupled with secondary antibody, followed by stringent washes.","input_data":"Cell lysate with fragmented RBP-RNA complexes","output_data":"Immunoprecipitated RBP-RNA complexes on magnetic beads","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"beads":"M-280 Sheep Anti-Rabbit IgG Dynabeads (ThermoFisher Scientific 11204D)","RBFOX2_antibody":"A300-864A lot 002, Bethyl; 10 ug per 20×10^6 cells (Rep1/Rep2) or 5 ug per 10×10^6 cells (RNase I variation)","SLBP_antibody":"RN045P lot 001, MBL International; 10 ug per 20×10^6 cells","IgG_control_antibody":"02-6102 lot 32013, Thermo Fisher Scientific"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":4,"description":"RNA ends on the bead-bound complexes are dephosphorylated and repaired to prepare for adapter ligation.","input_data":"Immunoprecipitated RBP-RNA complexes on magnetic beads","output_data":"Dephosphorylated and end-repaired RNA ends on beads","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzymes":"FastAP (ThermoFisher), T4 PNK (NEB)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":5,"description":"A barcoded RNA adapter is ligated to the 3′ end of the RNA on-bead in the presence of high-concentration PEG8000 to achieve >90% ligation efficiency; multiple replicates or RBPs can be uniquely barcoded and pooled at this step.","input_data":"End-repaired RNA on magnetic beads","output_data":"3′ barcoded RNA adapter-ligated RNA on beads (optionally pooled across barcoded replicates)","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzyme":"T4 RNA Ligase (NEB)","ligation_format":"on-bead","additive":"high concentration PEG8000","ligation_efficiency":">90%"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":6,"description":"Samples are resolved on standard SDS-PAGE protein gels and transferred to nitrocellulose membranes; a region ~75 kDa (~150 nt RNA) above the protein molecular weight is excised and treated with proteinase K to recover RNA.","input_data":"Bead-bound, adapter-ligated RBP-RNA complexes","output_data":"Isolated RNA fragments recovered from nitrocellulose membrane","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"membrane":"nitrocellulose","excision_size":"~75 kDa above protein size (~150 nt RNA)","proteinase_K":"NEB"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":7,"description":"Isolated RNA is reverse transcribed into cDNA, and excess oligonucleotides are removed by ExoSAP-IT treatment.","input_data":"RNA fragments isolated from nitrocellulose membrane","output_data":"cDNA with excess oligonucleotides removed","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"reverse_transcriptase":"AffinityScript (Agilent)","cleanup_enzyme":"ExoSAP-IT (Affymetrix)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":8,"description":"A second DNA adapter containing a 5′ random-mer (N5 or N10) is ligated to the 3′ end of the cDNA in the presence of high-concentration PEG8000 and DMSO to improve ligation efficiency and reduce secondary structure inhibition.","input_data":"cDNA with excess oligonucleotides removed","output_data":"cDNA with 3′ DNA adapter ligated (containing 5′ N5 or N10 random-mer UMI)","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"enzyme":"T4 RNA Ligase (NEB)","random_mer_options":"N5 or N10","additives":"high concentration PEG8000, DMSO"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":9,"description":"cDNA is cleaned up using Dynabeads MyOne Silane, and an aliquot is first used for qPCR to determine optimal PCR cycle number before the main sample is PCR amplified.","input_data":"Adapter-ligated cDNA","output_data":"PCR-amplified cDNA library","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"cleanup_beads":"Dynabeads MyOne Silane (ThermoFisher)","qPCR_purpose":"determine optimal PCR cycle number","PCR_polymerase":"Q5 (NEB)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":10,"description":"PCR-amplified libraries are size selected by agarose gel electrophoresis to remove adapter dimers and non-specific products.","input_data":"PCR-amplified cDNA library","output_data":"Size-selected sequencing library","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"method":"agarose gel electrophoresis"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":11,"description":"Size-selected libraries are sequenced on the Illumina HiSeq 2500 or 4000 platform as paired-end reads; read length depends on the random-mer length used.","input_data":"Size-selected sequencing library","output_data":"Raw paired-end FASTQ sequencing reads","software":"Illumina HiSeq","software_version":"HiSeq 2500 or HiSeq
